channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Susan Solves It: Concessions for renters
item.description: Tampa Bay 28's Susan El Khoury looks at a new report that found real estate listings show renters are getting more incentives lately.

item.title: [WATCHLIST: city council] [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] News to Know for July 24
item.description: Tampa City Council votes 'no' on Rays stadium land use transmittal. Plus, man convicted of killing his infant in DUI crash to be sentenced.

[WATCHLIST: city council] [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Tampa City Council makes history with rare 'no' vote on Rays stadium land use transmittal
item.description: Tampa City Council voted 4-3 Thursday to block a land use amendment tied to a proposed Tampa Bay Rays development.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Sumter County detective arrested after alleged misuse of law enforcement databases
item.description: A Sumter County sheriff’s detective has been fired and arrested for allegedly improperly accessing confidential law enforcement databases to monitor a person connected to her husband.

item.title: [WATCHLIST: tropical storm] [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Tropical Storm Bertha strikes Gulf Coast near the Texas-Louisiana line in second landfall
item.description: Tropical Storm Bertha made a second landfall Thursday near the Texas-Louisiana state line after grazing southern Louisiana in a crawl that triggered heavy surf and some flooding along the Gulf Coast.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] College graduates face competitive market as artificial intelligence spending rises
item.description: A new report shows that nearly half of hiring managers would rather invest in artificial intelligence tools than train the latest class of college graduates.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] 9 teens complete program to drop charges from Tampa teen takeover
item.description: Nine teenagers who faced fighting charges after a May teen takeover in Tampa graduated Thursday from a six-week accountability program.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Deceased female found near Plant City mobile home park
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Florida Lottery Fantasy 5, Cash Pop results for July 23, 2026
[The Florida Channel] 7/23/26 2027 Florida Teacher of the Year Gala
item.description: 7/23/26 2027 Florida Teacher of the Year Gala first appeared on The Florida Channel 7/23/26 2027 Florida Teacher of the Year Gala first appeared on The Florida Channel
